changes.before: She swung back into the saddle. This was the part of the world that made sense: bow across her back, road under hoof, a border that could be ridden and held by living hands instead of argued over by people who thought maps obeyed them.
changes.after: She swung back into the saddle. This was the part of the world that made sense: bow across her back, road under hoof, a border that could be ridden and held by living hands instead of argued over by people who mistook maps for authority.

changes.before: A budget session could wait until it learned to hunt.
changes.after: A budget session could wait until after the patrol.

changes.before: On everything south of the city, unless the weather has learned respect.
changes.after: On everything south of the city, unless the weather's worsened there too.

changes.before: Sylvanas marked it because she marked what guarded her lands.
changes.after: Sylvanas noted it because she tracked what guarded her lands.

changes.before: The pleasant day died where it sat.
changes.after: The pleasant day ended there.

changes.before: She wasn't pushing north. She was kneeling at the nearest stone with frost worked through a chalk circle and notes all over the ground.
changes.after: She had stopped at the nearest stone, kneeling with frost worked through a chalk circle and notes all over the ground.

changes.before: Not invasion. Not asylum. Rot.
changes.after: Rot.

changes.before: Which made it either nonsense or the wrong kind of truth.
changes.after: Which made it either nonsense or a warning about the wards in the language of spoiled grain and wells.

changes.before: The space beside her opened at once.
changes.after: Lor'themar was gone, and she knew it at once.

changes.before: That the ward wasn't under attack. That it was carrying damage from farther south and nobody was listening.
changes.after: That it was carrying damage from farther south and nobody was listening.

changes.before: The ward hum thickened until it sat in Sylvanas's teeth.
changes.after: The ward hum thickened until it buzzed in Sylvanas's teeth.

changes.before: That lodged.
changes.after: She held onto that.

changes.before: Frost-bitten knuckles and ink stains belonged to scholars and field workers, the sort who let the work chew at the body around it.
changes.after: Frost-bitten knuckles and ink stains belonged to scholars and field workers who let the job split their hands and stain their fingers.

changes.before: By the time the outpost came into full view, anger had worn down into a colder, more useful thing.
changes.after: By the time the outpost came into full view, anger had worn down into hard focus on the outpost.

changes.before: Cyndia met her outside, braid dark at the temples, posture straight enough for respect and tired enough for truth.
changes.after: Cyndia met her outside, braid dark at the temples, posture still straight despite the drag of fatigue at the corners of her mouth.

changes.before: Cyndia met her outside, braid dark at the temples, posture straight enough for respect and tired enough for truth.
changes.after: Cyndia met her outside, braid dark at the temples, posture still straight despite the drag of fatigue at the corners of her mouth.

changes.before: It only made her stranger than expected, and strange problems liked to become personal if you left them alone.
changes.after: It only made her stranger than expected, and strange problems became personal if you left them alone.

changes.before: Angry. Not frightened, unless it was buried deep enough not to show.
changes.after: Angry, with any fear buried too deep to show.

changes.before: Not all. Some on the road. Some before she crossed.
changes.after: Some on the road. Some before she crossed.

changes.before: Everyone with ears had simply understood this had crossed from routine detention into whatever came next.
changes.after: Voices had dropped around the yard.

changes.before: Cyndia almost smiled.
changes.after: Cyndia's mouth twitched once.

changes.before: Cyndia almost smiled.
changes.after: Cyndia's mouth twitched once.

changes.before: She wasn't trying to run. She was furious we wouldn't let her keep working.
changes.after: She was furious we wouldn't let her keep working.

changes.before: No jewels. No velvet. No polished escort from the Kirin Tor. Just a hard-used young mage in a border cell, hands chewed raw by her own work, all of her bent toward the ward-stone instead of this room.
changes.after: Just a hard-used young mage in a border cell, hands chewed raw by her own work, all of her bent toward the ward-stone instead of this room.

changes.before: Blue eyes fixed on Sylvanas at once.
changes.after: The prisoner met Sylvanas straight on at once.

changes.before: This had stopped being paperwork the moment she saw the hands.
changes.after: Ink. Split knuckles. Frostbite.

changes.before: The runner hesitated.
changes.after: The runner dragged in another breath.
